response: The product team’s competitive analysis update outlines that Competitor X launched new AI features last week, which include an auto-categorization capability our product currently lacks, are priced twice as high as our offering, and have earned a neutral market response, while our product retains key competitive advantages of better APIs and third-party integrations. To counter this new competitor launch and sustain our market edge, the product team recommends fast-tracking our internal AI roadmap development item.
